appSubtitle: Complete each step carefully and your progress will be saved automatically.
name: Name
stepOneDescription: Tell us who you are and how we can contact you.
stepTwoDescription: Share the household details that shape your current needs.
stepThreeDescription: Add context in your own words, or use AI assistance to polish your draft.
reviewDescription: Check every answer before submitting the application.
successDescription: Your application has been recorded. You can start a new one at any time.
submissionsDescription: Review the applications that have been submitted from this browser.
nationalIdHint: Use 5 to 20 characters and include at least one number.
validationErrors: Please fix the highlighted fields before continuing.

validation.invalidField: Please enter a valid value for this field.
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.nameMax: Name must be 80 characters or fewer.
validation.nationalIdMin: National ID must be at least 5 characters.
validation.nationalIdMax: National ID must be 20 characters or fewer.
validation.nationalIdInvalid: National ID must be 5 to 20 characters and include at least one number.
validation.dateOfBirthInvalid: Enter a valid date of birth.
validation.dateOfBirthFuture: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
validation.addressMin: Address must be at least 5 characters.
validation.addressMax: Address must be 150 characters or fewer.
validation.cityMin: City must be at least 2 characters.
validation.cityMax: City must be 60 characters or fewer.
validation.stateMin: State must be at least 2 characters.
validation.stateMax: State must be 60 characters or fewer.
validation.countryMin: Country must be at least 2 characters.
validation.countryMax: Country must be 60 characters or fewer.
validation.phoneMin: Phone number must be at least 8 digits.
validation.phoneMax: Phone number must be 20 characters or fewer.
validation.phoneDigits: Phone number must contain 8 to 15 digits.
validation.emailMax: Email must be 100 characters or fewer.
validation.dependentsInteger: Dependents must be a whole number.
validation.dependentsMax: Please select a valid dependents value.
validation.monthlyIncomeRequired: Please select a monthly income range.
validation.currentFinancialSituationMin: Please provide at least 30 characters about your current financial situation.
validation.employmentCircumstancesMin: Please provide at least 30 characters about your employment circumstances.
validation.reasonForApplyingMin: Please provide at least 30 characters for your reason for applying.

aiError.missingApiKey: Missing OpenAI API key. Add VITE_OPENAI_API_KEY to your environment.
aiError.invalidResponse: Invalid response from the AI service.
aiError.timeout: The AI request timed out. Please try again.
aiError.network: Network error while contacting the AI service.
aiError.unexpectedResponse: The AI service returned an unexpected response.
aiError.unable: Unable to generate a suggestion right now.

submissionFailed: Unable to submit the application right now.
optionalAiHint: AI suggestions can help you refine the wording while keeping your facts intact.
narrativeHint: Write at least 30 characters. AI suggestions can help you refine the wording while keeping your facts intact.
noSubmissionsDescription: Once you submit an application, it will appear here.
